zh.Hatton, Warwickshire, England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾哈頓
zh.Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可哈維爾爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Eaton於1590年12月26日之前出生在英國瓦維其可爾哈頓時，他的父親Thomas Eaton25歲，母親Mrs. Helen Eaton25歲。他於大約1618年與Ann在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1668年10月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可哈維爾爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Eaton于1590年12月26日之前出生在英国瓦維其可爾哈頓时，他的父亲Thomas Eaton25岁，母亲Mrs. Helen Eaton25岁。他于大约1618年与Ann在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1668年10月29日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼艾可哈維爾爾。

nameMeanings.name: Eaton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Eaton or Eton, such as Eaton Socon (Bedfordshire), Eaton (Cheshire), or Eton (Buckinghamshire), named from either Old English ēa ‘river’ or ēg ‘island, low-lying land’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: Nathaneal Eaton, born in Coventry, England, c. 1609, came to MA in 1637 and was the first head of Harvard College, in 1638–39.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When John Eaton was born before 26 December 1590, in Hatton, Warwickshire, England, his father, Thomas Eaton, was 25 and his mother, Mrs. Helen Eaton, was 25. He married Ann about 1618, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 29 October 1668, in Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

Il a épousé Ann environ 1618, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 29 octobre 1668, à Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

ja.lifeSummary: John Eatonが1590年12月26日以前にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアハットオンで生まれた時，父Thomas Eatonは25歳，母Mrs. Helen Eatonは25歳であった。約1618年にイギリスでAnnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1668年10月29日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーエセックスヘイバーヒルで死去した。

ko.Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 하버힐
ko.lifeSummary: John Eaton(이)가 1590년 12월 26일 이전 영국 워윅실르 해턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Eaton(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Helen Eaton(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1618년 영국에서 Ann(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1668년 10월 29일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 에세스 하버힐에서 사망했다.

pt.Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colo: Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Eaton nasceu antes 26 de dezembro de 1590, em Hatton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Eaton, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Helen Eaton, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann aproximadamente 1618, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de outubro de 1668, em Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.Haverhill, Essex, Massachusetts Bay Colo: хавирилл, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Eaton родился перед 26 декабрь 1590 г. в местности хаттон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Eaton было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Helen Eaton, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann около 1618 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 29 октября 1668 г. в местности хавирилл, эссекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
